pipelineSteps.label: Verification
pipelineSteps.summary: Static audits and acceptance judging classified the artifact as blocked before Studio surfaced it.

pipelineSteps.label: Repair
pipelineSteps.summary: Repair tracks bounded follow-up passes when verification cites contradictions.
pipelineSteps.verificationGate: Repair may patch only cited failures, not restart the artifact wholesale.

pipelineSteps.label: Presentation
pipelineSteps.summary: Studio is presenting only the artifact surfaces that currently exist.
pipelineSteps.verificationGate: Preview becomes primary only after verified render or preview health exists.

contentGoals.summary: Orient the user to our quarterly performance immediately.
Explain the core ideas behind our quarterly performance.
Package the useful our quarterly performance fileset with clear orientation.

evidenceGoals.summary: Keep one grounded evidence surface visible on first paint.

presentationConstraints.summary: Use semantic structure so the primary surface is legible before enhancement.
Populate the first paint with meaningful content rather than empty shells.
Keep the artifact self-contained and renderable without external runtime assumptions.

skillNeeds.rationale: Persistent artifacts must keep keyboard, labeling, and readable structure obligations explicit.
Dense concept coverage benefits from a stronger narrative and section hierarchy spine.

skillDiscoveryResolution.rationale: Studio checked the published runtime guidance corpus for this request but did not find a qualifying skill to attach before authoring.
skillDiscoveryResolution.failureReason: No qualifying published runtime guidance matched the request's current skill needs.

blueprint.narrativeArc: Orient the user, stage the core concepts, surface evidence, and close with a request-faithful takeaway for summarize our quarterly performance.

sectionPlan.visiblePurpose: Frame the artifact thesis and orient the user immediately.
contentRequirements: A downloadable our quarterly performance bundle
firstPaintRequirements: Show the title, thesis, and active control state before script execution.

sectionPlan.visiblePurpose: Keep the differentiating concepts explicit and readable.
firstPaintRequirements: Render concrete concept labels rather than placeholder headings.

sectionPlan.visiblePurpose: Surface the artifact's primary evidence view on first paint.
firstPaintRequirements: Show populated evidence marks with visible labels and a default selected state.

sectionPlan.visiblePurpose: Close with summary and next-step framing.
contentRequirements: Summarize what the artifact teaches or proves.
Leave the user with an accurate closing comparison or takeaway.
firstPaintRequirements: End with a visible conclusion section or footer.

evidencePlan.purpose: Carry the default evidence view that anchors the artifact.
Provide a second evidence family so the artifact is not a one-chart shell.

obligations: Use semantic sections and preserve heading order.
Ensure interaction feedback remains perceivable after every state change.
ariaExpectations: Mapped controls expose selected state when applicable.
Evidence marks or diagrams expose labels or accessible names.

blueprint.variationStrategy: Preserve the scaffold family while varying composition through concept emphasis, evidence ordering, and motion restraint.

skillNeeds.rationale: Persistent artifacts must keep keyboard, labeling, and readable structure obligations explicit.
Dense concept coverage benefits from a stronger narrative and section hierarchy spine.

semanticStructure.label: Keep the differentiating concepts explicit and readable.
Surface the artifact's primary evidence view on first paint.
Close with summary and next-step framing.
bindings: Summarize what the artifact teaches or proves.
Leave the user with an accurate closing comparison or takeaway.

motionPlan: Reveal sections in narrative order instead of animating every element equally.
accessibilityObligations: Use semantic sections and preserve heading order.
Ensure interaction feedback remains perceivable after every state change.
responsiveLayoutRules: Preserve one readable primary column on narrow viewports.
Collapse side-by-side evidence into stacked sections without dropping shared detail.
staticAuditExpectations: Render at least 4 sections with semantic wrappers.
Keep first-paint evidence populated before scripts execute.
renderEvalChecklist: Hero, primary evidence, and detail region remain readable at first paint.
Evidence surfaces show distinct visual families rather than duplicated shells.
Interactive affordances remain visible and coherent on both desktop and narrow widths.
